summary: Tested mobile responsiveness (375px width) for all admin pages. All pages are properly responsive with mobile-optimized layouts. Tables are hidden on mobile and replaced with card layouts. Stats grids stack vertically. All modals are usable on mobile viewport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin pages are mobile responsive at 375px width. Tested: Login, Dashboard, Applications, Tasks, Contracts, Verifications, Documents, Email Inbox, Anosim. Mobile sidebar opens via hamburger menu with all nav items visible. Tables use hidden md:block and mobile cards use md:hidden pattern. Stats grids use grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 or grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3. All modals are scrollable and usable on mobile.

features_tested.admin_login_mobile: PASS - Form centered, inputs properly sized
features_tested.admin_dashboard_mobile: PASS - Cards stack vertically, welcome banner responsive
features_tested.admin_sidebar_mobile: PASS - Hamburger menu visible, sidebar opens with all nav items
features_tested.admin_applications_mobile: PASS - Desktop table hidden, mobile cards visible with all actions
features_tested.admin_tasks_mobile: PASS - Task cards with badges wrap properly, form responsive
features_tested.admin_verifications_mobile: PASS - Verification cards with responsive flex layout
features_tested.admin_documents_mobile: PASS - Desktop table hidden, mobile cards visible
features_tested.admin_email_inbox_mobile: PASS - Stats grid responsive (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3), mobile cards visible
features_tested.admin_anosim_mobile: PASS - Stats cards responsive, number cards stack vertically
features_tested.modals_mobile: PASS - All modals (application detail, task form, contract form, task assignment, verification view) are scrollable and usable

responsive_patterns_verified.tables_to_cards: Applications, Documents, Email Inbox use hidden md:block for tables and md:hidden for mobile cards
responsive_patterns_verified.stats_grids: Email Inbox uses grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3, Anosim uses grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3
responsive_patterns_verified.flex_layouts: Verifications use flex-col on mobile for card content
responsive_patterns_verified.badge_wrapping: Task card badges wrap properly with flex-wrap
responsive_patterns_verified.modal_scrolling: All modals have max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto for mobile scrolling
